countries/ukraine.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): Russian Jun 2 attack killed 22, wounded 138 across 38 locations. Daily strikes continue. OHCHR: 62,716 civilian casualties (16,126 killed). Special Tribunal for crime of aggression active.

countries/russia.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): Daily strikes on Ukraine. 1,700+ Ukrainians arbitrarily detained; torture systematic. 210,000+ alleged war crimes documented.

countries/israel.summary: DUAL-FRONT ONGOING (Jun 11-25): Gaza 72,996+ killed. UNRWA blocked. Lebanon: Jun 19 truce; fighting continues; Amnesty: unlawful mass evacuation orders = war crime of unlawful transfer. 29 towns displacement orders.

countries/lebanon.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): Jun 19 US-brokered truce agreed but fighting continued — Jun 9 eight killed in Tyre, Jun 13 five killed including mayor of Ar-Rihan. 4,000+ killed, 1.2M+ displaced since Mar 2 war start.

countries/iran.summary: EXECUTION SURGE ESCALATING (Jun 11-25): 31 executed Jun 13-16 (one every 3 hours). 134 in Khordad. 784+ YTD — 37-year high. Jun 25 NCRI brief documents ongoing. Executing prisoners during US peace talks.

countries/sudan.summary: EL OBEID CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): 10 consecutive days of RSF drone strikes, 50+ civilian deaths. 29-country UNHRC atrocity warning Jun 18. Famine in El-Fasher and Kadugli. UN: city weeks from catastrophe.

countries/south-sudan.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): 140,000 displaced in Akobo County alone; 300,000+ across Jonglei. 10M need humanitarian assistance. WFP serving 1.5M fewer than planned.

countries/yemen.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): 73 UN workers still detained by Houthis; one died in custody. 22.3M need humanitarian assistance. Only 12.7% of $2.16B funding met. HRW Jun 7 called for release.

countries/somalia.summary: FAMINE IMMINENT (Jun 11-25): Buur Hakaba famine projected end of June. 6M life-threatening food insecurity. WFP reaching only 1-in-10. Al-Shabaab food blockades. 1.9M children malnourished.

countries/nigeria.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): 35M at IPC Phase 3+; 15,000 at Phase 5 Catastrophe in Borno. JNIM first Nigeria attack. ISWAP expanding. WFP funding cuts imminent.

countries/burkina-faso.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): UN CERD: Fulani subjected to extrajudicial killings, enforced disappearances. 2M+ IDPs. Drone strikes on civilians. Sahel on brink of collapse per IPS Jun 10.

countries/mali.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL + OPEN CALIBRATION QUESTION (Jun 11-25): Three opposition figures disappeared May 8-11. Systematic enforced disappearances at crimes-against-humanity threshold. 1.5M severely food insecure. JNIM expanding into Nigeria.

countries/democratic-republic-of-c.summary: DUAL CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): Ebola 1,094 cases/277 deaths Jun 22; accelerating beyond borders. Washington Agreement unimplemented; 2,100+ killed since Jun 2025 peace deal.

countries/afghanistan.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): UN Jun: life becoming impossible in remote areas. 22M in need; appeal only 14% funded. Women civil servants terminated Jan 2026. Only country banning girls from secondary/higher education.

countries/myanmar.summary: ONGOING CRITICAL (Jun 11-25): Junta controls <40% of townships. 3.6M+ displaced; 15M+ food insecure. Arakan Army oppressive measures vs Rohingya. Aid blockades by junta.

countries/ethiopia.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): Renewed Tigray/Amhara border fighting Jan 2026. Aid access restricted in Amhara. Funding cuts worsening. US aid cuts devastating Tigray.

countries/north-korea.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): Kim Yo Jong Jun statements on irreversible nuclear status. IAEA: 'few dozen' warheads, 'very serious' advances. HRW: rights crisis needs attention alongside missiles.

countries/china.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): HRW Feb: repression deepens, extends abroad. Hundreds of thousands of Uyghurs still imprisoned. Tibetan education crackdown ongoing.

countries/venezuela.summary: TRANSITION WATCH (Jun 11-25): Jun 9: 54 military detainees released. 621 confirmed released since Jan transition. 500+ remain. Released prisoners barred from public speech. Revolving door concern.

countries/bolivia.summary: POST-CRISIS WATCH (Jun 11-25): Blockades cleared Jun 23. 90-day state of emergency declared Jun 20. 17+ died during protests; 365 arrested. Emergency restricts mass gatherings.

countries/hungary.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): ICC withdrawal effective June 2026. Apr 2026 constitutional amendments restricting LGBTQ assembly without consultation. Hosted Netanyahu without arrest.

countries/rwanda.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): Washington Agreement implementation failures. 2,100+ killed since Jun 2025 peace deal. HRW Jun 17 confirmed reality vs Trump declaration of peace. Composite 41.8 — near band boundary.

countries/united-states.summary: ONGOING WATCH (Jun 11-25): H.R. 1 ends Medicaid for refugees/asylees Oct 1, 2026. ACLU: $1T Medicaid cut largest in history. DEI enforcement gutted. Immigration enforcement protests active.

ai-labs/anthropic.summary: EXPORT CONTROL DAY 13-25 (Jun 11-25): Congressional Jun 26 deadline for Commerce/Lutnick response arrives tomorrow. Fable 5/Mythos 5 remain globally suspended. EU AI Act enforcement Aug 2. Composite 60 at functional/established boundary.

ai-labs/openai.summary: 42-STATE AG PROBE ACTIVE (Jun 11-25): Multistate subpoena Jun 13. Florida criminal investigation active. IPO filing (confidential SEC). Broadest consumer-protection action ever against frontier AI lab.

ai-labs/xai-grok.summary: DUAL ACTIVE LEGAL (Jun 11-25): OPC Canada PIPEDA ruling Jun 11 — Grok deepfakes violated PIPEDA privacy law. Devin Kim whistleblower lawsuit active in Santa Clara Superior Court.

ai-labs/deepmind-google.summary: AI CONTROL ROADMAP (Jun 11-25): Jun 18 DeepMind published first public AI control roadmap — acknowledged alignment may never be fully solved; defense-in-depth structural containment mandated. EU AI Act enforcement Aug 2.

ai-labs/palantir-ai.summary: FEDERAL WORKER SURVEILLANCE (Jun 11-25): $3.9M contract to spy on federal workers (USDA, SSA, VA). $30M ICE contract for undocumented immigrant tracking. Booz Allen/Leidos/SAIC contracts cut by GSA but Palantir exempted.

ai-labs/character-ai.summary: MINOR HARM SETTLEMENT (2026): Google and Character.AI settled lawsuits alleging AI chatbots harmed minors. Active ongoing litigation. EU AI Act enforcement Aug 2.

ai-labs/perplexity.summary: CNN lawsuit May 2026 — 17,000+ news items unlawfully scraped. Multiple active copyright/trademark suits (NYT, News Corp, Dow Jones, Reddit, Encyclopedia Britannica).

ai-labs/cohere.summary: COPYRIGHT LAWSUIT (Feb 2026): 14 major publishers filed copyright lawsuit against Cohere for unlawful reproduction. Active litigation. No new 14-day-window developments found.

fortune-500/microsoft.summary: AZURE/ISRAEL INVESTIGATION CLOSED (Jun 11-25): Jun 4 Covington & Burling review confirmed IMOD used Azure storage and AI services; 200M hours Palestinian surveillance recordings. Israel GM ousted. New human rights governance controls. EU AI Act enforcement Aug 2.

fortune-500/apple.summary: TOWSON NLRB ACTIVE (Jun 11-25): Jun 20 closure of first unionized Apple store. IAM filed ULP charge — union workers not offered same relocation as non-union closures. 54 Congress members called for NLRB investigation.

fortune-500/unitedhealth-group.summary: DOJ CRIMINAL + ANTITRUST PROBE (Jun 11-25): Criminal/civil inquiries into Medicare Advantage overbilling; Optum Rx; physician reimbursement. Third-party billing review launched. Jun 23 DOJ healthcare fraud takedown sector pressure.

fortune-500/humana.summary: DOJ FCA + nH PREDICT AI ALGORITHM (Jun 11-25): DOJ FCA complaint active for kickbacks/discrimination against disabled. Barrows class action (nH Predict AI denying nursing claims) ongoing. Jun 23 DOJ fraud takedown context.

fortune-500/alphabet-google.summary: DEEPMIND AI CONTROL ROADMAP (Jun 11-25): Jun 18 DeepMind roadmap. Google/Character.AI settled minor-harm lawsuit. EU AI Act enforcement Aug 2. $68M Google Assistant privacy settlement.

fortune-500/cvs-health.summary: Touched by fortune-500-healthcare sector sweep; Jun 23 DOJ healthcare fraud takedown (455 defendants, $6.5B) creates sector-level scrutiny. No CVS-specific enforcement action in last 14 days.

fortune-500/booz-allen-hamilton.summary: CONTRACT CANCELLATIONS (Jun 11-25): Treasury canceled $21M in Booz Allen contracts over data security breach. GSA reviewing top-10 consulting firms. Defense-contractor governance signal.

fortune-500/amazon.summary: Touched by fortune-500-tech-labor batch. Dec 2024 OSHA settlement still in monitoring period. No new material evidence in last 14 days.
